authors_affiliation: Zhengling He, Pengfei Zhang, Lirui Xu, Zhongrui Bai, Hao Zhang, Weisong Li, Pan Xia, Xianxiang Chen; State Key Laboratory of Transducer Technology, Aerospace Information Research Institute, Chinese Academy of Sciences, Beijing, China

result.official_rank: not reported (team states they were not ranked due to omissions in their submission)
result.evaluation_split: official hidden test set (full test set); also reported per hidden database subset and on a validation leaderboard set

self_reported_metrics.other: Challenge metric breakdown: Validation Set 0.616, Hidden CPSC Set 0.758, Hidden G12EC Set 0.590, Hidden Undisclosed Set 0.194, Full Test Set 0.370. Average 5-fold cross-validation challenge metric on public training data: 0.621 (ablation study best configuration; other configurations ranged 0.569-0.607).

model.architecture_details: 2-D convolutional neural network treating the 12-lead ECG as a 2D input with 'lead' and 'sample' dimensions; stacked Block1/Block2/Block3 residual-style convolutional blocks with decaying filter sizes and strides, Squeeze-and-Excitation (SE) channel attention modules, batch normalization, spatial dropout, and a global average pooling layer feeding a fully-connected sigmoid output layer for 27-class multi-label prediction.
model.key_novelty: Represents multi-lead ECG as a 2-D [lead, time] tensor (rather than converting to a time-frequency image) and controls cross-lead information fusion by progressively widening the convolution filter size along the lead dimension in deeper blocks, combined with SE attention.

input.signal_length_window: first 10 seconds of each record (chosen as the median record length), truncated or zero-padded to a consistent 10s length
input.sampling_rate: downsampled to 100 Hz (source data ranged 257-1000 Hz)
input.preprocessing: Band-pass filter with cutoff 0.05-20 Hz to remove baseline drift and high-frequency noise; Z-score normalization applied per lead.

data.training_datasets: 43,101 subjects from the 4 officially published Challenge training data sources; no external data reported
data.class_imbalance_handling: Weighted binary cross-entropy loss with per-class weights w_i = log2(1 / (n_i/N + ε)), ε=0.01, based on class frequency

training.optimizer: Adam, initial learning rate 0.001, with early stopping and learning-rate reduction (factor 0.5) on plateau
training.cross_validation_strategy: 5-fold cross-validation on the public training data for verification/tuning; within each split, data further divided 8:2 train/test and the training portion 9:1 train/validation for hyperparameter selection

contribution.summary: Proposes a 2-D CNN with residual-style blocks and Squeeze-and-Excitation attention that represents 12-lead ECG as a 2-D [lead, time] tensor, progressively fusing cross-lead information in deeper layers via widening convolution kernels along the lead axis.
